{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":691939,"duration_api_ms":539940,"ttft_ms":3117,"num_turns":76,"result":"Review complete. Verdict: **PASS_WITH_FINDINGS** — non-blocking for both pack and goal closeout.

CP00-796 is a descriptor-only RP26 Enterprise SaaS API shape/workflow pack whose descriptor-verified claim is fully supported: metadata is consistent across all artifacts, the 40-unit deliverable/micro-title distributions match the registry exactly, all 14 validation commands (including npm test and git diff --check) passed, no-write/no-real-data and authority boundaries are enforced in both code and tests, and the pack correctly does not over-claim runtime/enterprise trust. Claude stays a read-only reviewer, and Hermes is used only for descriptor evidence.

Only one P3 cosmetic finding: changed-file-scope.json double-classifies the pack's own evidence directory (authoritative scope fields are still correct). No P0/P1/P2 issues.

One process note: Grep/Glob repeatedly timed out on the oversized `registry.js` (very long lines) and the 708KB `command-evidence.json`, so I verified those via direct line-range Reads plus the passing test/validator evidence rather than search.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"5725fc6a-3f73-4b1a-ae66-e7a76aa6da00","total_cost_usd":4.224090499999999,"usage":{"input_tokens":1794,"cache_creation_input_tokens":129700,"cache_read_input_tokens":5076073,"output_tokens":34609,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":129700,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":426,"cache_read_input_tokens":131911,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6184,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":6184},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1144,"outputTokens":18,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.001234,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":1794,"outputTokens":34609,"cacheReadInputTokens":5076073,"cacheCreationInputTokens":129700,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":4.2228565,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS_WITH_FINDINGS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"CP00-796 (RP26 Enterprise SaaS Hardening, risk B, 40 units, RP26.P03.M02.S15-RP26.P03.M04.S12) is a descriptor-only API shape/workflow pack and its pack-level descriptor-verified claim is well supported. Metadata is consistent across manifest, review-baseline, review-request, and the registry pack binding (next CP00-797 / RP26.P03.M04.S13). The deliverable distribution (claude_review 2, implementation 19, contract 9, security_audit 4, test 5, hermes_evidence 1 = 40) and micro-title distribution (Type And Shape 6, Primary Implementation 22, Secondary Workflow 12) match the registry requirements and the manifest unit list exactly; I traced the API_CONTRACT_ROWS/API_TYPE_ROWS/API_IMPLEMENTATION_ROWS slices to per-section unit titles. All 14 commands in command-evidence.json returned exit 0, covering every expected validation command (closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack/test/validate/spec:requirements/weighted/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane/git diff --check) plus rp26:enterprise-saas:validate confirming pack CP00-796, next CP00-797/RP26.P03.M04.S13, unit_count 40. model.test.js carries three CP796 tests asserting coverage, runtime-closed descriptor/packets, and contract promotion, and npm test passed. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced both in code (ENTERPRISE_SAAS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION spread into every freezeResult; validateDescriptor rejects runtime execution, tenant/SSO/SCIM/secret payloads, permission/audit writes, and enterprise-trust claims) and in the contract cp796 projection/handoff. Authority boundaries hold: descriptor sets claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; Claude packet is read_only with promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; Hermes evidence is descriptor-only with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false (not embedded in product runtime). The pack does not over-claim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, and downstream adjudication/construction-inspection/claude-review-result are legitimately pending the receipt this review produces. Review-hardening preconditions are satisfied (claude-opus-4-8/effort max/read_only, tools Read,Grep,Glob, no forbidden tools, auth preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON, invalid_review_attempts empty). Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approval authority, consistent with the stated authority boundary. One non-blocking cosmetic observation about changed-file-scope.json labeling is recorded below.
